RESY 0.2
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Altitude data
    • RESY EUNIS habitat classifications
  • Changelog

Package index

Classification

resy_classify()
Classify vegetation plots with the expert system
resy_candidates()
List possible assignments per plot

Result evaluation

resy_eval_plot()
Evaluate and print details for a single plot
resy_eval_type()
Evaluate and print details for a vegetation type

Data preparation (general)

resy_check_taxonomy()
Check species names against an expert system's species list
resy_check_data()
Check the format of plot data for ESy classification
resy_aggregate_taxa()
Aggregate taxa to expert-system aggregation level

Data preparation (EUNIS)

resy_check_eunis()
Check plot data for EUNIS classification requirements
resy_harmonize_eunis()
Harmonize plot data for EUNIS classification
resy_eunis_names()
Official EUNIS habitat names

Expert system files

resy_validate_esy()
Validate an expert classification file
resy_available_classifications()
List available classifications
resy_load_expert()
Load a classification
resy_add_classification()
Add a new classification to the RESY store
resy_expert_path()
Get the path to a bundled classification file
resy_read_expert()
Read an expert-system file losslessly
resy_expert_tree()
Build the classification hierarchy of an expert system
resy_view_expert()
Render an expert-system hierarchy and open it in a browser
resy_write_expert_html()
Write an expert-system hierarchy to a self-contained HTML page

Data

dunes_bohn_500mbuffer_epsg25832
Bohn dune layer with 500 m buffer (EPSG:25832)
dunes_bohn_500mbuffer_25832
Bohn dune layer (unprojected)
coastline_regions_epsg25832
EEA coastline regions of Europe (EPSG:25832)
ecoregions2017_epsg25832
European ecoregions in EPSG:25832
europe_resolution_1_epsg25832
European countries in high resolution
europe_resolution_60_epsg25832
European countries in EPSG:25832

On this page
